title: Config module: CLI args and Config struct
description:
## Why
The client needs to know the server URL and auth method before it can connect.

## What
- clap-based CLI: --url, --bearer-token, --basic-user, --basic-pass, --ca-cert, --client-cert, --client-key
- Config struct holding parsed values
- Build an AuthProvider from Config (NoneAuth / BearerAuth / BasicAuth / CustomCaAuth / ClientCertAuth)
- Unit tests for arg parsing
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
